# Repository Instructions

- Prefer small, reviewable diffs that preserve the current editorial and SEO structure.
- Keep metadata, canonical tags, and JSON-LD in `src/layouts/RootLayout.astro`.
- Preserve the AI-augmented positioning across home, about, projects, and blog copy.
- Run `pnpm check` and `pnpm build` before proposing substantial changes.
- Do not remove accessibility labels, structured data, or project detail fields.
- When editing project content, keep `status`, `role`, `period`, `links`, `stack`, `metrics`, and `highlights` consistent with `src/content.config.ts`.
